description: The 'data-platform' namespace has two misconfigured CronJobs causing cluster instability. Reconfigure the 'hourly-backup' CronJob to forbid concurrent executions, retain only the 2 most recent successful and 1 failed job history records, and enforce a 3600-second timeout on the Job execution. Suspend the 'legacy-export' CronJob without deleting the resource. Access the environment via the Rancher UI (https://localhost, admin / Admin12345678!) or the terminal (kubectl).
